prompt: Flat design illustration on a completely transparent background. A stylized cheeseburger: light peachy-tan dome top bun with small white sesame seeds, wavy bright green lettuce strip, golden yellow draped melted cheese, dark brown flat patty, flat peachy-tan bottom bun. In the bottom-right corner overlapping the burger, a small circular badge with cream/off-white fill and thin burnt orange border, containing a bold burnt orange checkmark. No text, no other elements, ONLY the burger and checkmark badge floating on transparent background.
